---
title: "Vocabulary Data"
format:
  pptx:
    slide-level: 2
---

## 2-2. PC by Word

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**2-2-1. Mean PC by Word**

![](../figures/main/p2-2-1_pc-word-mean.png){width=100%}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**2-2-2. SD of PC by Word**

![](../figures/main/p2-2-2_pc-word-sd.png){width=100%}
:::

::::

## 3. Word-level LM

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**3-1. Intercept**

![](../figures/main/p3-1_intercept-word-lm.png){width=100%}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**3-2. Slope**

![](../figures/main/p3-2_slope-word-lm.png){width=100%}
:::

::::
